creator: levi@teklife.info
text:
I have a Belkin PCI Raid controller card with two 200GB drives installed. It isn't running as a RAID. I have both drives mounted separately. After I transfer a file around 1GB at max speeds (usually only 4MB/s). During the upload the speed will slow to a halt, then start back up again.

That's when I get the interrupt storm detected on "irq9:"; throttling interrupt source
ad5: TIMEOUT - WRITE_DMA retrying (0 retries left)


vmstat -i

interrupt                          total       rate
irq0: clk                     1009788110       1000
irq1: atkbd0                          19          0
irq4: sio0                             6          0
irq6: fdc0                            23          0
irq7: plip0 ppbus0                     1          0
irq8: rtc                      129233454        127
irq9: atapci1+                   5903222          5
irq11: rl0                       4224734          4
irq14: ata0                       641263          0
Total                         1149790832       1138
